title: Algae strain maintenance (Chlamydomonas reinhardtii)
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3ndnf","text":"All steps described in this protocol are intended to be conducted in a research laboratory.  Follow aseptic procedures.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"f6mst","text":"Prepare the work place (i.e: Clean and desinfect with ethanol 70%), if in a biological cabinet, follow the UV desinfection protocol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"5nr3b","text":"Use EPIs at all times. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"acp43","text":"UV radiation is harmfull, protect your skin.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Always follow aseptic techniques Autoclavate freshly prepared TAP media with 1.5 Mass / % volume, bacteriological agar with a magnetic bar inside Mix the flask using a magnetic stirrer to evenly dissolve the agar in the solution For antibiotic containing plates, cool down the flask temperarute until 55 °C - 60 °C or until it is possible to hold it without hurting the skin. Add antibiotics in the desired amount, and mix using a magnetic stirrer to evenly dissolve the antibiotic Pour the molten media in sterile petri dishs. (Keep volume constant among plates). Wait for media to solidify Stock at 4 °C - 8 °C until use. (Storage for 2 months was used without noticeable difference)

Keep agar plates in the bench until they reach Room temperature From a plate or liquid culture contaning the algae sample, collect a portion and applied it to the fresh plates. From a dense culture ( 1 x 10^7 cells/mL ) 50 µL to 100 µL suffice. From a agar plate, scratch the lawn with the innoculation loop until the loop is full. Spread the cells in the new plate Wrap the plate with parafilm, and place it at 25 °C , 60-80 µmols de photons/m2s for 120:00:00 (5days).

Place plates with the newly grown cells at a dark enviroment and Room temperature After . (Dark is needed to avoid overgrown of the cells, due to photosynthesis. Media contains acetate which keeps the cells viable over a month).
After 672:00:00 (1 month), cells should be pass to a new plate. Longer periods are possible, but increase the chance of losing the strain.
creator: Joao Vitor Molino
